sizing_rule.note: Apply fractional f (e.g., 0.1f or 0.2f) derived from optimal f methodology to reduce drawdown and volatility. Position size = FRAC × optimal_f. Use N = ln(Goal)/ln(A) to calculate trades needed for TWR target, where A is adjusted geometric mean at fractional f level.

source_rule_text: Size positions using a fraction of optimal f (fractional f) to reduce volatility and drawdown while maintaining positive expectancy across N trades needed to reach a specific TWR goal.
